# Project Buildup History: Retrieval & Tool-Use Assistant

- Repository: `retrieval-tool-use-assistant`

## 2025-08-05 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Retrieval & Tool-Use Assistant should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write a simple problem statement for Retrieval & Tool-Use Assistant and the user it serves so the project had a decent base. I was still mostly figuring out the shape of it, so a lot of the day went into small notes and half clear ideas. There were a few moving parts here, so I kept simplifying the plan in my head before touching anything else.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem statement written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. There were still a couple of loose parts, but nothing serious enough to block the next step.
